qa_pairs.question: How can users transfer data using rsync and scp to the tamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can utilize a login node on the tamIA cluster to transfer data via tools such as rsync and scp.

qa_pairs.question: What type of high-performance interconnect network is used on the tamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: The tamIA cluster uses an InfiniBand NVIDIA NDR network to link together all of its nodes.

qa_pairs.question: How are GPUs connected to the InfiniBand network on the tamIA cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Each GPU on the tamIA cluster is connected to a single NDR200 port via an NVIDIA ConnectX-7 HCA. Each GPU server has either 4 or 8 NDR200 ports connected to the InfiniBand fabric.
